case_title: CHRIS BROESAMLE et al VS. CARRIE MALLEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROESAMLE, CHRIS RIDENOUR, MATTHEW WOODWARD, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALLEN, CARRIE $3,057.57 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,117.57, DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY HAS TENDERED PAYMENT OF $1889.71 AND $216.39. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THOSE PAYMENTS. IF EITHER CHECK CAN NOT BE CASHED BECAUSE IT IS STALE DATED, THE PARTIES CHALL COOPERATE TO HAVE NEW CHECKS ISSUED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MALLEN, CARRIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BROESAMLE, CHRIS RIDENOUR, MATTHEW WOODWARD, KEVIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
